title: Enrich SEO content with maximum keywords and neighboring cities

requirements.text: Enrich the meta title and meta description in frontend/index.html with an expanded set of geo-targeted keywords covering VERDIER COUVERTURE's service area: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse, Val-d'Oise (95), and Île-de-France. Keywords must also cover services: couvreur, toiture, réfection, réparation, pose de tuiles, zinguerie, isolation, nettoyage toiture, traitement toiture, couvreur urgence, couvreur pas cher.

quotes: Oui fait le plus de mots cle possible avec toute les ville voisine

acceptanceCriteria: The <title> tag includes VERDIER COUVERTURE and at least 5 of the listed neighboring cities.
The <meta name='description'> includes at least 8 neighboring city names and 5 service keywords.
Open Graph og:title and og:description are also updated with expanded keywords.
The JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data includes an 'areaServed' array listing all the neighboring cities and the Val-d'Oise / Île-de-France region.

requirements.text: Add a dedicated hidden-but-indexable SEO keyword section (visually minimal, styled with small muted text or integrated as a 'zones d'intervention' section) in the page — either in the Footer or as a new section between Contact and Footer — listing all served cities and towns: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse, Val-d'Oise (95), Île-de-France. Present them as 'Zones d'intervention' using proper H2/H3 heading and a responsive tag-cloud or grid layout consistent with the existing earthy roofing theme.

quotes: fait le plus de mots cle possible avec toute les ville voisine

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Zones d'intervention' section or subsection is visible on the page with all listed city names.
The section uses at least an H2 or H3 heading with a relevant keyword like 'Couvreur Val-d'Oise – Zones d'intervention'.
City names are rendered as plain text or tags (not hidden via CSS display:none or visibility:hidden).
The layout is responsive and consistent with the site's earthy terracotta/slate color theme.
The section appears between the Contact section and the Footer, or is integrated into the Footer.

requirements.text: Update the text content of the Hero section (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx), About section (frontend/src/components/About.tsx), and Contact section (frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx) to naturally weave in geo-targeted keywords referencing neighboring cities. For example, the Hero subtitle should mention 'Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise et toute la région Val-d'Oise'; the About section should mention the intervention area; the Contact section should reinforce 'couvreur disponible sur Cergy, Argenteuil, Conflans, Herblay et environs'.

quotes: fait le plus de mots cle possible avec toute les ville voisine

acceptanceCriteria: Hero subtitle or highlights mention at least 3 neighboring cities naturally in French.
About section body text references the service area with at least 5 city names.
Contact section includes a mention of the cities served (at least 5 city names).
All added text reads naturally in French and does not appear as keyword stuffing.
No existing design elements, phone numbers, address, or email are modified.

requirements.text: Update the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data block in frontend/index.html to add an 'areaServed' property as an array of City objects covering all neighboring municipalities: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse. Also add a 'knowsAbout' array listing the main roofing services as keywords.

quotes: fait le plus de mots cle possible avec toute les ville voisine

acceptanceCriteria: The JSON-LD block contains an 'areaServed' array with at least 20 City entries, each with '@type': 'City' and 'name'.
The JSON-LD block contains a 'knowsAbout' array with at least 8 roofing service keywords in French.
The JSON-LD remains valid and parseable (no syntax errors).
Existing fields (name, address, telephone, email, etc.) are not modified.

constraints: Do not modify phone numbers, email address, or postal address already configured.
Do not alter immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components).
All added text must be in natural French — no keyword stuffing patterns.
City names must not be hidden via CSS (display:none, visibility:hidden, opacity:0) as that is a black-hat SEO practice.
nonGoals: Creating a Google My Business profile or any external third-party account.
Submitting the sitemap to Google Search Console.
Adding a blog or dynamic content pages.
Changing the visual design, color palette, or typography.
